exp_desc: RetailRocket quick rule probe: ML1 hybrid-rule winner + RR v2 winning layouts/dims, mostly R1 with R0 sentinels.
cmd: python3 hyperopt_tune.py --config-name config --max-evals 8 --tune-epochs 60 --tune-patience 8 --seed 1404 --run-group fmoe_rule --run-axis hparam --run-phase RRRULE_R1_G4_C04_L18F24 model=featured_moe_v2_tune dataset=retail_rocket eval_mode=session feature_mode=full_v2 gpu_id=4 log_wandb=false enable_tf32=true fmoe_debug_logging=false train_batch_size=4096 eval_batch_size=8192 MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=10 ++search.MAX_ITEM_LIST_LENGTH=\[10\] embedding_size=128 ++search.embedding_size=\[128\] num_heads=8 ++search.num_heads=\[8\] d_feat_emb=24 ++search.d_feat_emb=\[24\] d_expert_hidden=160 ++search.d_expert_hidden=\[160\] d_router_hidden=64 ++search.d_router_hidden=\[64\] expert_scale=3 ++search.expert_scale=\[3\] fmoe_v2_layout_id=18 ++search.fmoe_v2_layout_id=\[18\] fmoe_stage_execution_mode=serial ++search.fmoe_stage_execution_mode=\[serial\] learning_rate=0.0001594032 +weight_decay=9.862213949e-05 hidden_dropout_prob=0.10 balance_loss_lambda=0.010 ++search.learning_rate=\[3e-4\,4e-4\,5e-4\,6.5e-4\,8e-4\,1e-3\,1.2e-3\] ++search.weight_decay=\[0.0\,2.5e-5\,5e-5\,1e-4\,1.5e-4\] ++search.hidden_dropout_prob=\[0.10\] ++search.balance_loss_lambda=\[0.010\] router_impl=learned ++search.router_impl=\[learned\] ++router_impl_by_stage=\{mid:rule_soft\,micro:rule_soft\} ++search.router_impl_by_stage=\[\{mid:rule_soft\,micro:rule_soft\}\] router_use_hidden=true ++search.router_use_hidden=\[true\] router_use_feature=true ++search.router_use_feature=\[true\] rule_router.n_bins=5 rule_router.feature_per_expert=4 moe_top_k=0 ++search.moe_top_k=\[0\] fmoe_schedule_enable=false ++search.fmoe_schedule_enable=\[false\] alpha_warmup_until=0 ++search.alpha_warmup_until=\[0\] alpha_warmup_start=0.0 ++search.alpha_warmup_start=\[0.0\] alpha_warmup_end=1.0 ++search.alpha_warmup_end=\[1.0\] temperature_warmup_until=0
